---
title: "Final Project"
author: "Alexa Santana"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
library(quantmod)
library(lubridate)

start <- ymd("2008-01-01")
end <- ymd("2026-01-01")

getSymbols(c("SPY", "QQQ"), src = "yahoo",
           from = start, to = end)

date_tib <- as_tibble(index(SPY)) |>
  rename(start_date = value)

qqq_tib <- as_tibble(QQQ)
spy_tib <- as_tibble(SPY)

all_stocks <- bind_cols(date_tib, qqq_tib, spy_tib)


stocks_long <- all_stocks |>
  dplyr::select(start_date, QQQ.Adjusted, SPY.Adjusted) |>
  pivot_longer(2:3, names_to = "Stock_Type", values_to = "Price") |>
  mutate(Stock_Type = fct_recode(Stock_Type,
                                 QQQ = "QQQ.Adjusted",
                                 sandp = "SPY.Adjusted"
                                 ))

stocks_qqq <- stocks_long |> filter(Stock_Type == "QQQ")
stocls_spy <- stocks_long |> filter(Stock_Type == "sandp")


## looking at each ETF individually: 

ggplot(data = stocks_qqq, aes(x = start_date, y = Price)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal()

ggplot(data = stocls_spy, aes(x = start_date, y = Price)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal()


## comparing them: 

ggplot(data = stocks_long, aes(x = start_date, y = Price)) +
  geom_line(aes(colour = Stock_Type)) +
  geom_area(aes(fill = Stock_Type), alpha = 0.2, position = "identity") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() 

  ## look at how to add a dotted line in lubridate: 
  ## geom_vline(xintercept = "2008-01-01", linetype = "dotted")


## look at different ETFs and compare 
## maybe do like a difference plots of volatility?? 
## build a model and try and predict at the end of a year what stock will be x, y, z??

```
